primary_diagnosis: ESP-lifted well (Reeves 17H, Wolfcamp A, 7,786 ft lateral) showing classic end-of-run signature: motor current unbalanced and trending up, vibration alarms over the last three weeks, and drawdown lost versus offset performance. Recommend pulling the unit and swapping to a right-sized ESP staged for the current inflow — deferring risks an off-bottom failure and a fishing job.
